# To Comment or Not To Comment

This is the well-known discovery copy for agentic assistants.

Canonical slides: https://www.indrapatil.com/to-comment-or-not/
Root llms.txt: https://www.indrapatil.com/to-comment-or-not/llms.txt
Root llms-full.txt: https://www.indrapatil.com/to-comment-or-not/llms-full.txt
Source: https://github.com/IndrajeetPatil/to-comment-or-not/

Summary: A comprehensive guide to code commenting best practices for software development. Learn when, how, and why to write effective comments that enhance code clarity and maintainability.
